────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
FILE: tests\runtime\runtime.test.d.ts.map
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
{"version":3,"file":"runtime.test.d.ts","sourceRoot":"","sources":["runtime.test.ts"],"names":[],"mappings":""}

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
FILE: tests\runtime\runtime.test.js
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
import { Parser } from '@graphscript/parser';
import { Evaluator } from '@graphscript/runtime';
describe('Runtime', () => {
    test('evaluates simple data', () => {
        const parser = new Parser();
        const evaluator = new Evaluator();
        const program = parser.parse(`data:
  x = 1
  y = 2
`);
        const values = evaluator.execute(program);
        expect(values.x).toBe(1);
        expect(values.y).toBe(2);
    });
    test('evaluates constants', () => {
        const parser = new Parser();
        const evaluator = new Evaluator();
        const program = parser.parse(`const PI = 3.14`);
        const values = evaluator.execute(program);
        expect(values.PI).toBe(3.14);
    });
    test('evaluates expressions', () => {
        const parser = new Parser();
        const evaluator = new Evaluator();
        const program = parser.parse(`data:
  x = 1 + 2
  y = 10 * 5
  z = 2 ^ 3
`);
        const values = evaluator.execute(program);
        expect(values.x).toBe(3);
        expect(values.y).toBe(50);
        expect(values.z).toBe(8);
    });
    test('evaluates function calls', () => {
        const parser = new Parser();
        const evaluator = new Evaluator();
        const program = parser.parse(`data:
  xs = range(0, 5, 1)
`);
        const values = evaluator.execute(program);
        expect(values.xs).toEqual([0, 1, 2, 3, 4]);
    });
    test('runs algorithm with trace', () => {
        const parser = new Parser();
        const evaluator = new Evaluator();
        const program = parser.parse(`algo Sum(arr):
  total = 0
  for x in arr:
    total = total + x
    emit:
      x = x
      total = total

data:
  result = Sum([1, 2, 3])
`);
        const values = evaluator.execute(program);
        const trace = evaluator.getTrace('Sum');
        expect(trace).toBeDefined();
        expect(trace?.rows.length).toBe(3);
    });
    test('uses math functions', () => {
        const parser = new Parser();
        const evaluator = new Evaluator();
        const program = parser.parse(`data:
  s = sin(0)
  c = cos(0)
`);
        const values = evaluator.execute(program);
        expect(values.s).toBeCloseTo(0);
        expect(values.c).toBeCloseTo(1);
    });
});
//# sourceMappingURL=runtime.test.js.map

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
FILE: tests\runtime\runtime.test.js.map
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
{"version":3,"file":"runtime.test.js","sourceRoot":"","sources":["runtime.test.ts"],"names":[],"mappings":"AAAA,OAAO,EAAE,MAAM,EAAE,MAAM,qBAAqB,CAAC;AAC7C,OAAO,EAAE,SAAS,EAAE,MAAM,sBAAsB,CAAC;AAEjD,QAAQ,CAAC,SAAS,EAAE,GAAG,EAAE;IACvB,IAAI,CAAC,uBAAuB,EAAE,GAAG,EAAE;QACjC,MAAM,MAAM,GAAG,IAAI,MAAM,EAAE,CAAC;QAC5B,MAAM,SAAS,GAAG,IAAI,SAAS,EAAE,CAAC;QAClC,MAAM,OAAO,GAAG,MAAM,CAAC,KAAK,CAAC;;;CAGhC,CAAC,CAAC;QACC,MAAM,MAAM,GAAG,SAAS,CAAC,OAAO,CAAC,OAAO,CAAC,CAAC;QAC1C,MAAM,CAAC,MAAM,CAAC,CAAC,CAAC,CAAC,IAAI,CAAC,CAAC,CAAC,CAAC;QACzB,MAAM,CAAC,MAAM,CAAC,CAAC,CAAC,CAAC,IAAI,CAAC,CAAC,CAAC,CAAC;IAC3B,CAAC,CAAC,CAAC;IAEH,IAAI,CAAC,qBAAqB,EAAE,GAAG,EAAE;QAC/B,MAAM,MAAM,GAAG,IAAI,MAAM,EAAE,CAAC;QAC5B,MAAM,SAAS,GAAG,IAAI,SAAS,EAAE,CAAC;QAClC,MAAM,OAAO,GAAG,MAAM,CAAC,KAAK,CAAC,iBAAiB,CAAC,CAAC;QAChD,MAAM,MAAM,GAAG,SAAS,CAAC,OAAO,CAAC,OAAO,CAAC,CAAC;QAC1C,MAAM,CAAC,MAAM,CAAC,EAAE,CAAC,CAAC,IAAI,CAAC,IAAI,CAAC,CAAC;IAC/B,CAAC,CAAC,CAAC;IAEH,IAAI,CAAC,uBAAuB,EAAE,GAAG,EAAE;QACjC,MAAM,MAAM,GAAG,IAAI,MAAM,EAAE,CAAC;QAC5B,MAAM,SAAS,GAAG,IAAI,SAAS,EAAE,CAAC;QAClC,MAAM,OAAO,GAAG,MAAM,CAAC,KAAK,CAAC;;;;CAIhC,CAAC,CAAC;QACC,MAAM,MAAM,GAAG,SAAS,CAAC,OAAO,CAAC,OAAO,CAAC,CAAC;QAC1C,MAAM,CAAC,MAAM,CAAC,CAAC,CAAC,CAAC,IAAI,CAAC,CAAC,CAAC,CAAC;QACzB,MAAM,CAAC,MAAM,CAAC,CAAC,CAAC,CAAC,IAAI,CAAC,EAAE,CAAC,CAAC;QAC1B,MAAM,CAAC,MAAM,CAAC,CAAC,CAAC,CAAC,IAAI,CAAC,CAAC,CAAC,CAAC;IAC3B,CAAC,CAAC,CAAC;IAEH,IAAI,CAAC,0BAA0B,EAAE,GAAG,EAAE;QACpC,MAAM,MAAM,GAAG,IAAI,MAAM,EAAE,CAAC;QAC5B,MAAM,SAAS,GAAG,IAAI,SAAS,EAAE,CAAC;QAClC,MAAM,OAAO,GAAG,MAAM,CAAC,KAAK,CAAC;;CAEhC,CAAC,CAAC;QACC,MAAM,MAAM,GAAG,SAAS,CAAC,OAAO,CAAC,OAAO,CAAC,CAAC;QAC1C,MAAM,CAAC,MAAM,CAAC,EAAE,CAAC,CAAC,OAAO,CAAC,CAAC,CAAC,EAAE,CAAC,EAAE,CAAC,EAAE,CAAC,EAAE,CAAC,CAAC,CAAC,CAAC;IAC7C,CAAC,CAAC,CAAC;IAEH,IAAI,CAAC,2BAA2B,EAAE,GAAG,EAAE;QACrC,MAAM,MAAM,GAAG,IAAI,MAAM,EAAE,CAAC;QAC5B,MAAM,SAAS,GAAG,IAAI,SAAS,EAAE,CAAC;QAClC,MAAM,OAAO,GAAG,MAAM,CAAC,KAAK,CAAC;;;;;;;;;;CAUhC,CAAC,CAAC;QACC,MAAM,MAAM,GAAG,SAAS,CAAC,OAAO,CAAC,OAAO,CAAC,CAAC;QAC1C,MAAM,KAAK,GAAG,SAAS,CAAC,QAAQ,CAAC,KAAK,CAAC,CAAC;QACxC,MAAM,CAAC,KAAK,CAAC,CAAC,WAAW,EAAE,CAAC;QAC5B,MAAM,CAAC,KAAK,EAAE,IAAI,CAAC,MAAM,CAAC,CAAC,IAAI,CAAC,CAAC,CAAC,CAAC;IACrC,CAAC,CAAC,CAAC;IAEH,IAAI,CAAC,qBAAqB,EAAE,GAAG,EAAE;QAC/B,MAAM,MAAM,GAAG,IAAI,MAAM,EAAE,CAAC;QAC5B,MAAM,SAAS,GAAG,IAAI,SAAS,EAAE,CAAC;QAClC,MAAM,OAAO,GAAG,MAAM,CAAC,KAAK,CAAC;;;CAGhC,CAAC,CAAC;QACC,MAAM,MAAM,GAAG,SAAS,CAAC,OAAO,CAAC,OAAO,CAAC,CAAC;QAC1C,MAAM,CAAC,MAAM,CAAC,CAAC,CAAC,CAAC,WAAW,CAAC,CAAC,CAAC,CAAC;QAChC,MAAM,CAAC,MAAM,CAAC,CAAC,CAAC,CAAC,WAAW,CAAC,CAAC,CAAC,CAAC;IAClC,CAAC,CAAC,CAAC;AACL,CAAC,CAAC,CAAC"}

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
FILE: tests\runtime\runtime.test.ts
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
import { Parser } from '@graphscript/parser';
import { Evaluator } from '@graphscript/runtime';

describe('Runtime', () => {
  test('evaluates simple data', () => {
    const parser = new Parser();
    const evaluator = new Evaluator();
    const program = parser.parse(`data:
  x = 1
  y = 2
`);
    const values = evaluator.execute(program);
    expect(values.x).toBe(1);
    expect(values.y).toBe(2);
  });

  test('evaluates constants', () => {
    const parser = new Parser();
    const evaluator = new Evaluator();
    const program = parser.parse(`const PI = 3.14`);
    const values = evaluator.execute(program);
    expect(values.PI).toBe(3.14);
  });

  test('evaluates expressions', () => {
    const parser = new Parser();
    const evaluator = new Evaluator();
    const program = parser.parse(`data:
  x = 1 + 2
  y = 10 * 5
  z = 2 ^ 3
`);
    const values = evaluator.execute(program);
    expect(values.x).toBe(3);
    expect(values.y).toBe(50);
    expect(values.z).toBe(8);
  });

  test('evaluates function calls', () => {
    const parser = new Parser();
    const evaluator = new Evaluator();
    const program = parser.parse(`data:
  xs = range(0, 5, 1)
`);
    const values = evaluator.execute(program);
    expect(values.xs).toEqual([0, 1, 2, 3, 4]);
  });

  test('runs algorithm with trace', () => {
    const parser = new Parser();
    const evaluator = new Evaluator();
    const program = parser.parse(`algo Sum(arr):
  total = 0
  for x in arr:
    total = total + x
    emit:
      x = x
      total = total

data:
  result = Sum([1, 2, 3])
`);
    const values = evaluator.execute(program);
    const trace = evaluator.getTrace('Sum');
    expect(trace).toBeDefined();
    expect(trace?.rows.length).toBe(3);
  });

  test('uses math functions', () => {
    const parser = new Parser();
    const evaluator = new Evaluator();
    const program = parser.parse(`data:
  s = sin(0)
  c = cos(0)
`);
    const values = evaluator.execute(program);
    expect(values.s).toBeCloseTo(0);
    expect(values.c).toBeCloseTo(1);
  });
});

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
FILE: tsconfig.json
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2020",
    "module": "commonjs",
    "lib": ["ES2020"],
    "outDir": "./dist",
    "rootDir": "./src",
    "strict": true,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "forceConsistentCasingInFileNames": true,
    "resolveJsonModule": true,
    "declaration": true,
    "declarationMap": true,
    "sourceMap": true,
    "moduleResolution": "node"
  },
  "include": ["src/**/*"],
  "exclude": ["node_modules", "dist", "**/*.test.ts"]
}

================================================================================
END OF EXPORT
================================================================================
